name: redactcast
title: RedactCast
description: Reversible PII Masker: Sanitize sensitive data before sending to AI, and restore it locally.
author: Tomokisan

preferences.name: teamApiKey
preferences.title: Team API Key
preferences.description: B2B Sync Engine API Key to download custom rules.

commands.name: mask-clipboard
commands.title: Mask Clipboard
commands.description: Replaces sensitive data in the clipboard with placeholders.

commands.name: rehydrate-clipboard
commands.title: Rehydrate Clipboard
commands.description: Restores the original data back into the AI's response.

commands.name: force-sync-rules
commands.title: Force Sync Team Rules
commands.description: Downloads the latest masking rules from your organization.
